The second It movie, It Chapter Two, was released on September 6, 2019.

```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?release_date WHERE {
  wd:Q42726338 wdt:P577 ?release_date
}
```
